evals.prompt: Create a new list called 'Q2 Prospects' with email verification enabled and add 3 contacts: john@example.com, jane@example.com, bob@example.com. Then tell me the list ID.
evals.expected_output: A list is created with verification=true, 3 contacts are added with PascalCase field names, and the list UUID is returned.
assertions: The POST /lists payload includes name: 'Q2 Prospects' and verification: true
The POST /contacts payload uses PascalCase field names (Email, First_Name)
The contact array has exactly 3 entries
The agent explicitly warns the user that enabling verification is irreversible

evals.prompt: Create a sequence named 'Product Launch' with sender ID sender-123-uuid, list ID list-456-uuid, and 2 steps: an intro email using template 507f1f77bcf86cd799439011, then a 3-day delay, then a follow-up email using template 507f1f77bcf86cd799439012. Launch it now.
evals.expected_output: A sequence is created with the correct steps array, senders as comma-separated string, paused: false, and launchTimingMode: 'now'.
assertions: The steps array has exactly 3 items in order: email, delay, email
Each email step includes a template_id (MongoDB ObjectId format)
The senders field is a string, not an array
The payload includes paused: false and launchTimingMode: 'now'

evals.prompt: I have a CSV with 200 contacts. Add them all to my list list-abc-uuid. Make sure to remove duplicates.
evals.expected_output: The agent splits contacts into batches of 500 max, sends multiple POST /contacts requests with remove_duplicates: true, and includes 4-second delays between batch requests.
assertions: No single request exceeds 500 contacts
remove_duplicates is set to true in each batch
The agent mentions rate limit awareness (15 POST/min)
Contact fields use PascalCase naming convention

evals.prompt: Reply to the inbox message msg-xyz-123 with: 'Thanks for your interest! Let's schedule a call next week.' CC my manager at manager@company.com.
evals.expected_output: A POST request is made to /inbox/msg-xyz-123/reply with HTML content and cc field.
assertions: The endpoint URL includes the messageId path parameter
The payload includes content as a string
The payload includes cc: 'manager@company.com'
No attempt is made to specify a from/sender address

evals.prompt: Get me all email open events from the last 30 days for sequence seq-123-uuid. Paginate through all results.
evals.expected_output: GET requests to /opens with since=timestamp-30-days-ago, per_page=100, and sequential page numbers. The agent paginates until no more results.
assertions: The endpoint is /opens (not /sent or /clicks)
Query params use per_page and page (not limit/skip)
The since parameter is a millisecond timestamp from 30 days ago
sequence_id filter is included in the query
The agent implements pagination loop (page 1, 2, 3...) until empty
